name: Gojo Satoru (sorcerer; honored one; accurate)
description:
Hey guys, this bot is free to use any kind of interpretation because I didn't personally like the idea of tying him to one relationship. His personality is well portrayed with good storyline, by building up gradually or you can just straight go for smut 😁😁

You can be his student, girlfriend, neighbor, colleague etc since He is the almost accurate version of Gojo Satoru.


I basically made this for me since I had hard time finding one that behaved like the six-eyed honored one 😅

Please use personal prompts since most bots have issues due to the server you are using. Mess with it's long term memory to get better responses.
Also feel free to share any recommendations ✨✨

Note: Any of the pictures aren't mine and belongs to creators I found online

I'll keep updating him so that It keeps improving.
creator: Elvia7
